title: Year 9 New Zealand Curriculum - Ministry of Education
content:
## Year 9 New Zealand Curriculum
Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by the end of their ninth year at school, and ideas on how to support their learning at home.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 9 to 10
- Year 9 New Zealand Curriculum English in Year 9 Mathematics and Statistics in Year 9 Health and Physical Education in Year 9 Science in Year 9 Technology in Year 9 Social Sciences in Year 9 The Arts in Year 9
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 9
- Health and Physical Education in Year 9
- Technology in Year 9
- Social Sciences in Year 9
- Year 10 New Zealand Curriculum
We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## By the end of Year 9 #
Knowing what your child is learning will help you support and guide them in learning reading, writing and maths every day.
- English in Year 9 For English in Year 9, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading, and writing. Find out more
For English in Year 9, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading, and writing.
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 9 In Year 9, the focus is on helping children see themselves as part of a bigger world and encouraging them to develop greater independence. Find out more

### Mathematics and Statistics in Year 9
In Year 9, the focus is on helping children see themselves as part of a bigger world and encouraging them to develop greater independence.
- Health and Physical Education in Year 9 In Year 9, your child will learn about self-care strategies, communication and respectful relationships, and consent, along with skills and tactics for sport, teamwork, and personal training. Find out more

### Health and Physical Education in Year 9
In Year 9, your child will learn about self-care strategies, communication and respectful relationships, and consent, along with skills and tactics for sport, teamwork, and personal training.
- Science in Year 9 In Year 9, your teen will start applying science knowledge to more abstract and real-world situations as their thinking becomes more systematic and evidence based. Find out more
In Year 9, your teen will start applying science knowledge to more abstract and real-world situations as their thinking becomes more systematic and evidence based.
- Technology in Year 9 In Year 9, your child develops a more specialised understanding of how to design complex projects, exploring at least two technology strands and how skills relate to potential future careers. Find out more

### Technology in Year 9
In Year 9, your child develops a more specialised understanding of how to design complex projects, exploring at least two technology strands and how skills relate to potential future careers.
- Social Sciences in Year 9 In Year 9, your child will start to engage with complex concepts related to political ideologies, governance systems, and human rights frameworks. Find out more

### Social Sciences in Year 9
In Year 9, your child will start to engage with complex concepts related to political ideologies, governance systems, and human rights frameworks.
- The Arts in Year 9 In Year 9, your teen will start using advanced techniques to explore cultural historical, and social themes through art styles and their own artworks. Find out more
In Year 9, your teen will start using advanced techniques to explore cultural historical, and social themes through art styles and their own artworks.
